creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #5)
> Looks fine as far as backport of that particular commit.
Yes, I meant the commit itself is very likely incomplete, at least that's what vishwin told me on IRC, showing some later commits fixing things...

> *SSL is mainly used (by bundled cargo) to fetch registry + crates when
> building outside of ports.
Good to know, I'll give that a test soon!
